description_long: This is a large, double-headed battle axe with a menacing and ornate design. The blades are wide, symmetrical, and feature sharp, jagged edges with a dark metallic finish accented by deep red inlays that form intricate patterns. The central shaft is robust and appears to be made of a dark, heavy metal, segmented with decorative bands and a spiked pommel at the base. The axe head is reinforced with additional spikes protruding from the top and bottom, enhancing its aggressive appearance. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and ergonomically contoured for a secure grip, with subtle texturing for added control. This weapon exudes a fantasy or gothic aesthetic, making it a striking and formidable object.
description: A large, double-headed battle axe with jagged, dark metallic blades and red decorative inlays, featuring a spiked pommel and a robust, textured handle.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full width of the double-headed axe, highlighting the symmetrical, jagged blades and red inlays.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thin profile of the axe, emphasizing the thickness of the blades and the straight, cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same ornate blade design and central shaft details.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the slim profile, with the spiked pommel and handle contours visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical metal handle with segmented grip features and subtle texturing, made of dark metal.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, wide, symmetrical blades with jagged edges, deep red inlays, and additional spikes on top and bottom; no beard or poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Integrated, likely forged as a single piece with decorative and functional reinforcements.
